---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 提交功能建议
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Background / 需求背景

What problem are you trying to solve, and why is this feature needed?

你遇到了什么问题，为什么需要这个功能？

## Proposed Solution / 期望方案

Describe the behavior or interaction you would like to see.

请描述你期望的行为或交互方式。

## Alternatives Considered / 备选方案

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

是否考虑过其他实现方式？

## Impact / 影响范围

- User impact / 用户影响：
- Technical impact, if known / 技术影响（若了解）：

## Additional Context / 其他补充

Include mockups, reference links, or any extra context if helpful.

可附上示意图、参考链接或上下文信息。
